paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 251 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 160 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 64 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 4 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 42 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **27 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 51 days past due with 34 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,424 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 39 days past due with 34 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 49 days past due with 27 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $33,553 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 26 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **42 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 24 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,652 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 23 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **68 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 25 days past due with 16 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 13. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,434 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Karim-Merchant:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 6. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **24 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 6. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 53 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

290 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **258 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 24 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$112,007 in payments going out this week** across 54 tasks — make sure funds are available. $10,000 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is carrying 61 overdue, higher than their recent average. Time to clear the backlog.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 42 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **27 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 41 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 13 overdue — oldest first. **23 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 6 overdue — oldest first. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 24 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
